description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a stone-textured lower level and a smooth, light-colored upper level. The roof is a steep gable style in a warm brown tone, with a prominent triangular section above the main entrance. Windows are arranged symmetrically, with wooden frames and crossbars, and the upper story includes a small attic window. The main entryway is marked by a covered porch with a slanted roof, supported by simple posts and accessed by a short set of steps with a wooden railing. The exterior design is clean and geometric, with a mix of rectangular and square elements, and the house sits on a raised foundation. The overall appearance suggests a blend of traditional and modern suburban architectural influences.
description: A two-story house with a gable roof, stone-textured base, symmetrical wooden windows, and a covered porch entryway. The design combines traditional and modern suburban elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large windows, a central window, and the stone-textured lower level.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the main entryway with a covered porch, attic window, and side railing.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the gable roof, attic window, and the porch roof extending from the main structure.
description_view_3: Rear view with three evenly spaced windows and the stone-textured lower level, no visible entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with slanted roof, wooden railing, and steps leading to a single main door
